UpdateAppBlb.desc: Description of the LoadBalancer instance, allowing users to add more detailed information. Length 0–450 bytes, supports Chinese characters. Defaults to empty.
UpdateAppBlb.blbId: The ID of the LoadBalancer to be updated.
UpdateAppBlb.clientToken: Idempotency token, no more than 64 characters in length.
UpdateAppBlb.name: The name of the LoadBalancer for easy identification. Length 1–65 bytes, must start with a letter, and may contain letters, digits, and the characters -\_/. If not specified, a name will be generated automatically.
UpdateAppBlb.allowDelete: Whether deletion is allowed. Defaults to true, indicating deletion is permitted.
UpdateAppBlb.allocateIpv6: Whether to allocate an IPv6 address. true means allocate an IPv6 address; false means do not allocate an IPv6 address.
